caption:
CS WELCOMING NIGHT!!🥳

The new semester is upon us! Please join us this Thursday evening for a night of socializing, games, refreshments and prayer.

If you have any friends you’d like to bring, please do! The more the merrier! 🗣️🔥

📆 Date: Thursday 9 April
⏰️ Time: 7.30 PM
📍 Venue: FAIE CLCR3047

P.S: We will have refreshments then we will gerak to our usual mamak session! 🥙

Thank you for being part of our 1st speaker session of the semester! 🗣️🤍

We had such a meaningful time learning the Word of God together and growing spiritually. 💪
The message on “Why should we believe in Christ?” truly gave us so much to reflect on.

A special thank you to our guest speakers from Youth With A Mission (YWAM) for sharing with us 🤍

We hope this is just the beginning of your journey,see you next week!💓

CSRW is here again! 🥳🩷

We’ve got a booth at CLC23 (right in front of CNMX) ,come find us! 
Drop by to chat, play some games, register and just hang out with us 🤍 

We’re also selling our CF T-shirts 👕 (RM22 each)! 
It’s a preorder, so do come to our booth to fill in your details and choose your size. We’ve got samples available , you can check out the design and feel the material before ordering. 

Payment can be made at the booth (online payment is available too), and we’ll pass your tee to you once it’s ready! 

If you prefer online, feel free to PM us 📩 
But we highly recommend dropping by to see it in person 😉 

Come hang out with us , see you there! ✨

#mmu #mmucyberjaya #mmucscyber #christiansociety

IDENTITY CRISIS? 🤔

Ever caught yourself wondering…
Who am I? Am I loved? Am I defined by the world around me?

You’re not the only one.

Join us this coming week for an interactive reflection session entitled "Identity Crisis?" where we'll walk through thought-provoking stations, explore real questions about identity, and discover a perspective that might just change how you see yourself 🤍

Come as you are and bring a friend along tooo (or a few 👀)

See youu soon! 

🗓️ : 21st April 2026
⏰ : 7:30PM
📍 Location : *To be announced in our story*

#mmu #christianfellowship #mmucyberjaya

IDENTITY CRISIS? 🤔

From questions to reflections… thank you everyone who came and journeyed with us 🤍
Hope you left with a new perspective on who you are 👀

See you at the next one ✨

#mmucscyber #mmucyberjaya #mmu #christian

MMUCS is back! 🌿
Here is a little sneak peak of our theme, objectives, and committee members for this semester!🙌🏻✨

We will be having activities every Tuesday night, so come join us, have fun and be part of our community! 💛

Hope to see you very soon and stay tuned for our upcoming activities! 🥰🫶🏻

#mmucyberjaya #mmucs

CSRW Interviews!  Let‘s see what everyone has to say 👀

If you’re interested in what we do,
feel free to join us this Thursday for our Welcoming Night ✨🥳

Thank you to everyone who joined our Boy-Girl Relationships session 🤍

Special thanks to Mr. Lemuel and Mrs. Melanie for sharing their wisdom and reminding us to pursue relationships with intention, boundaries, and Christ at the center.

Here is a short summary of our session. 
We were challenged to :
- reflect on becoming the right person, instead of just trying to find one, 
- value accountability over secrecy 
- recognise red flags and patterns over potential

This is a reminder that singleness is not a lack, but a season of growth. Relationships should never replace what only God can fulfill, but instead should draw us closer to Him ❤️

That's all for now! See you guys very soon for another insightful session! 👀

MMUCS T-shirt is now open for PREORDER 👕✨
You can order online, but we’d love for you to drop by our CSRW booth to check out the sample 🤍

🔎📖Hi everyone! We're having our 2nd bible surgeon session this week! 📖🔍

Come join us as we learn the Word of God together and improve ourselves spiritually. 💪 
As we *dive* into this  supernatural story, let's open our hearts to learn more about the story of Jesus calming the storm and the lessons behind it! 🌊
We hope to see you there! 😎

📅 20 Jan 2026
⏰ 7:30 PM
📍 CLCR 3045

This is a place where strangers become family,where ordinary days turn into moments we’ll always remember. 🫶🏻
There’s always room for one more, we’d love to have you with us next semester. 🤍

All the best for your exams, you’ve got this 💪✨
Finish strong, then enjoy your well-deserved sem break!☀️

See you soon ♡

#mmu #mmucyberjaya #mmucs #campuslife #christian

HE IS RISEN!! 🤍

As we celebrate the resurrection of our Saviour Jesus Christ, let us be reminded that indeed, 'Nothing is impossible with God'. Just as He said, He rose again and conquered death. No circumstance is too difficult for Him, and no miracle is too hard for Him. 

Let us rejoice and be grateful, that there is hope even after death through the ultimate sacrifice made for us out of love. The resurrection isn’t just a story, it’s a promise. Because Jesus lives, our past is forgiven, our present has purpose, and our future is secure in Him.

1 Corinthians 15:55 - “Where, O death, is your victory? Where, O death, is your sting?”

Thank you everybody for being part of our Pillow Talk session 🤍
So many amazing testimonies shared, proud of all of you ❣️

Hope you felt safe to reflect, connect with God, and grow together in fellowship and strength.

See you next week! 💪🏻🌙

We asked everyone in MMUCS to bring a snack/dish that starts with the first letter of their names for Farewell Night 🌟 Let‘s take a look at what everyone brought along!🤭

#mmucf #christiansociety #mmu #mmucyberjaya #party

caption:
As this semester comes to an end, we take a moment to pause, reflect, and give thanks. Some of us will be returning next semester, while others will be stepping into a new chapter after graduation. Wherever we’re headed, farewell night is about celebrating the memories, lessons, and friendships we’ve built, and entrusting what’s next to God.🥰

For our farewell makan, each person is invited to bring a dish, snack, or drink that starts with the first letter of your name (e.g. Sarah brings Sushi 🍣). Each item should be suitable for 5–10 pax , within a budget of RM 5–20 .😆

Kindly write your name in our WhatsApp group / slide into our DMs if you’re coming!

📅 Date: 03 Feb 2026
⏰ Time: 7:30pm
📍 Venue: FAIE CLBR 1022

We’re back with another Pillow Talk session ✨

Come join us as we come together to fellowship, share openly, and get to know one another on a deeper level. It’s a time to listen, reflect, and journey together as a community, no pressure, just genuine connection.🥰

Come as you are, feel free to wear your pyjamas, bring your favourite plushie, and get comfy with us 🧸🌙

📅 Date: 13th Jan 2026
⏰ Time: 7:30pm
📍 Venue: FAIE CLBR1022

If God is good, why do we suffer?

A question many of us have wrestled with quietly.
This session is a space to pause, reflect, and engage honestly with faith, pain, and hope.
Not all questions need immediate answers .Sometimes, we journey through them together 🤍

📅 Date: 27th Jan 2026
⏰ Time: 7:30pm
📍 Venue: FAIE CLBR1022

Week 12, but we still gathered for Bible Surgeon 🩺📖
Grateful for a time to slow down, dive into God’s Word, and reflect together 🤍
Thankful for Lyon for serving as our speaker truly a blessing to this session 💪🏻

Pressing on with strength and grace as the semester continues ✨

Boy-Girl Relationships (BGR) 🩷

Couple goals? Single? Taken? It’s complicated? 👀
Whatever your status is, whether you're praying for "The One," navigating a season of singleness, or currently walking hand-in-hand with a special someone, this night is for you! 🕊️ 
We’re diving into the heart of God-Honoring Relationships with our guest speakers, Pastor Lemuel Yee & Mrs. Melanie.

Expect a night of real-talk, honest answers, and how to build a foundation that lasts. Don’t come alone! Bring your boyfriend, your girlfriend, your "situationship," or even your best bud! The more, the merrier!

🗓 Date: 28 April 2026 (Tuesday)
⏰ Time: 7:30 PM
📍 Location: TBD

Don't come alone! Bring a friend!

If God is good, why do we suffer?
Recap & notes from our speaker session 🤍
Huge thanks to Mrs. Christine Michael for such a powerful and eye-opening sharing.✍🏼
Thank you everyone who came.  Take time to reflect, pray, and let God move. ❣️
What an amazing time we had at Welcoming Night! 😎 Thank you for being part of it! We’re excited to catch up with everyone again tomorrow. Stay tuned! 🤩

🔊Hi everyone! This is the first speaker session of the semester! 🔊

Join us as we study God's Word and grow spiritually. 💪 
Most significantly, our guest speakers from *YWAM (Youth With A Mission)* will provide a message that God wants us to understand on the subject of *"Why should we believe in Christ?"*.

We hope to see you there, and don't forget to bring a buddy! 😎

✨ We’re back after a looong break! ✨
Ever found yourself thinking… “Just this once…?”, “Will God forgive me if I fall again?”, or “Does confessing make it okay?” 🤔

Join us for a special speaker session on “Sin Now, Seek Forgiveness Later?” and let’s explore what the Bible says together! 🙏💫

📅 6 Jan 2026
⏰ 7:30 PM
📍 FAIE CLBR1022
Merry Christmas, everyone! 🎄✨ May your hearts be filled with joy and your homes with love this holiday season. Wishing you all a blessed celebration and a joyful New Year ahead!

Come join us for a warm night of games, bonding, and celebrating the joy God has given us this season! ❤️

We’ll also be having a gift exchange, so remember to bring a small present worth at least RM10 🎁✨

📅 9 Dec 2025
⏰ 7:30 PM
📍 FAIE CLBR1022

Can’t wait to celebrate and make memories together! 🤍

Thanks for the amazing preparation session for our graduating fam! 🫶🏻

Let’s gather as a family to celebrate and bless those stepping into a new chapter this Saturday and Monday. 🎉

See you next week! 🔥

Thank you everyone for joining us 🤍
We’re so thankful for the joyful gathering and the fellowship we shared.
May the love and peace of Christ stay with you always.
Stay merry and have a blessed Christmas 🎄✨

#mmu #mmucyberjaya #mmucs

Hope everyone can slow down, celebrate well, and enjoy the season.🎄❤️🫶🏻
No CF on Dec 23 & Dec 30.
See you in the New Year 🤍✨

Happy and Blessed Good Friday to everyone. 
May this day, where we remember the suffering and sacrifice of our Savior and Lord Jesus Christ, fill your hearts with peace and hope for the future. 🕊️🤍
Let us commemorate the love that was displayed on the cross, which saved us all from eternal damnation and freed us from all our sins and bondages.❤️‍🩹

John 3:16 - ’For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.‘✝️

#goodfriday #mmucscyber #mmu

🩺📖 Bible Surgeon Night: The Prodigal Son

The story might be familiar, but there’s always more to discover 😊
Come hang out with us as we gently “operate” on the parable of the Prodigal Son. Chatting, sharing, and uncovering beautiful truths about repentance, grace, and God’s restoring love!

No pressure, just a cozy night of learning, reflection, and fellowship. 🫂

📅 Date: 16 December 2025
⏰ Time: 7:30 PM
📍 Venue: FAIE CLBR 1022

We’d love to see you there! ✨
#mmucs #mmucyberjaya #campuslife #christian

📍FAIE CLBR 1022

#mmucyberjaya #christmas #christmasparties #christmasseason #christian #mmucf #mmucs #mmu

✨ Moments from our session on “Sin Now, Seek Forgiveness Later?” ✨

So thankful for Pastor Steven Soon for sharing about temptation, God’s forgiveness, and the importance of reflecting on our choices. 💛

Swipe to see notes and reminders from the session! 📝

See you again next week !!🫶🏻
A big shoutout to everyone who came to farewell night! 🎊 Your energy made it unforgettable. Looking forward to reuniting next semester! Keep in touch! 🤗

What an amazing session of Bible Surgeon we had last Tuesday!!✨ Ms Caroline navigated us through Luke 15, giving us interesting insights behind each verse. We hope this session helped you learn more about our God! 📖🔍

If you missed Bible Surgeon, don't worry!
Swipe till the end for a summary of our topic.🥰

Thanks for joining us, and stay tuned for our upcoming activities 🫶🏻

Ready to spread some joy? 🎁 Join us as we prepare special gifts for our amazing Alumnis who will be graduating very sooon! Plus, we’ll have board games to keep the fun rolling. All the beautiful gifts will create a special memory for those who have been a part of this family! See you theree

📅 Date: 2nd December 2025 (Tuesday)
🕐 Time: 7:30 PM - 9:30 PM
📍 Location: FAIE CLBR 1022

For this Malaysia Day, we celebrated the unity we have in Christ and are cherished a time well spent together! 

From silly games to sharing meals and laughing till our stomachs hurt, it was such a sweet reminder of the joy found in God’s family. 

Grateful for the joy, the friendships, and the fellowship that make days like these unforgettable. 🇲🇾✨

✈CSRW NOVEMBER HAS ARRIVED!✈

🎉MMUCS is setting up a booth at CSRW this Tuesday till Thursday! Come hang out with us, play some fun games, make new friends and join the community! We can't wait to meet you! 🤗 

📅 Date: 18 – 20 November 2025
⏰ Time: 10 AM – 5 PM
📍Location: Central Plaza

Week 7 is almost here, and you know what that means… it’s time for our last session of the semester: MMUCS Farewell Night! 🎉💛 You’re warmly invited to join us as we wrap up the semester with joy, laughter, and fellowship together. Let’s celebrate, give thanks, and send our love to one another before the break ✨

📅 Date: 23 September
🕣 Time: 7:30–9:30pm
🏠 Venue: FAIE CLBR1022

The world says “ follow your heart ,” but the Bible says “ follow Jesus.”🧐
How then do we tell God’s voice apart from our own feelings?🤨 

Whether you‘re exploring your faith or just curious, you’re warmly welcomed to find out more from our speaker, Elder Dexter this Tuesday. 🥰🤩

📅 Date: 25th November 2025 (Tuesday)
🕐 Time: 7:30 PM - 9:30 PM
📍 Location: FAIE CLBR 1022

We’re super excited to invite you to our Welcoming Night! 🔥 
A fun, cosy time for us to meet you and celebrate all our amazing new members! 🙌🏻

Whether you’re joining us for the first time or coming back after a break, we honestly can’t wait to see your lovely faces! 🤗

Just come as you are! Exploring your faith, looking for a community, or simply wanting to make new friends. We’re here to welcome you with open arms and warm hearts! 😎✨

📅 Date: 20th November 2025 (Thursday)
🕐 Time: 7:30 PM - 9:30 PM
📍 Location: FAIE CLCR 1022

P.S; Refreshments are available! 🍕

Thank you so much for coming and we hope y‘all had a wonderful time of fellowship and fun! ❤️ As we wrap up this semester, just wanted to say that it’s truly been a blessing to journey together with each and every one of you, as one family in Christ. But, this isn’t the end !! 🤭 

we look forward to seeing all your faces again next semester! Until then, all the best for your exams, keep striving for the Lord, and stay safe! See you all very soon ❤️

Hey friends! 🌿✨
It’s time to take a break from assignments and screens , let’s head outdoors together for a refreshing Chill & Connect Outing Day! 🚴‍♀️🚣‍♂️

We’ll be going to Taman Botani Putrajaya on 16th Sept 2025 (Tue) for an afternoon of cycling, kayaking, paddling and simply chilling by the lake. This is the perfect chance to relax, recharge, and connect with one another outside of campus life.🗣️
 
📅 Date : 16th September 2025
📍 Meeting Point: MMU FAIE Parking (Cyberjaya)
🕐 Gathering Time: 1.00 P.M. sharp before we head off together.

You can let us know through DMs if you want to come along too!! See yall there🫶🏻
What an amazing time we had at Welcoming Night and CSRW! 🌟 Thank you for being part of it! We’re excited to catch up with everyone again next week. Stay tuned! 🫶

That’s a wrap for our speaker session on “Should I Follow My Heart?”!! ✨🩷

So blessed to have Elder Dexter with us, reminding us to anchor our hearts in God’s truth and let His Word guide our decisions. 😚

Swipe to the end for a summary of our speaker session.🥰
Thanks for joining us, and hope to see you next week! 🫶🏻

#mmucscyber #mmu #mmucyberjaya

POV : You spent your public holiday with MMUCS!❤️‍🔥 
Happy Malaysia Day everyone!!🇲🇾✨

That’s a wrap for our Worship & Reflection Night!! 🔥 It was an evening of open hearts, honest conversations, and deep reflections as we looked back on our semester together. Although the night was warm, it was such a joy to worship and reflect alongside everyone , a reminder that we’re not walking this journey alone.

Thank you to everyone who came with open hearts and made this night so meaningful. ❤️‍🔥

Hey, Guys! We’re back again this week with a very interesting Speaker Session 🥳🥳✨. 

We have a special guest who will be sharing on the topic of ‘Understanding The Father’s Love‘. So, let’s join our hearts together as we listen to the message prepared for us ✨🙌. 

See you on Tuesday🥰

We are so excited to invite you to our Welcoming Night,  where we get to meet and celebrate all our new members! 😁 

Whether you’re new to us or returning after the break, we can’t wait to see your faces! 😎

Come just as you are, whether you’re exploring your faith, looking for a community, or simply wanting to make new friends. We’re ready to welcome you with open arms and hearts! 🔥

📅 Date: 20th August 2025 (Wednesday)
🕐 Time: 7:30 PM - 9:30 PM
📍 Location: FOM CRCR0001

P.S; Refreshments are available! 🍕

Come and hang out !!🫶🏻
A new semester begins, and with it we’re excited to introduce the dedicated committee members of MMUCSCYBER ! Let’s look forward to all that’s ahead and keep them in prayer as they lead! ✨
